title: Shell Hutts
content:

The '''Shell Hutts''' were the smallest of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Kajidic/Legends|clans]]. They resided on [[Circumtore/Legends|Circumtore]] and had a tortoise insignia.

They were identical to regular Hutts in all but the fact that they wore [[Shell Hutt armor|armored shells]], welded together from heavy [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] plates. These shells were used to protect themselves from radiation. Their massive bulk was supported by built-in [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsors]]. Shell Hutts grew to even larger proportions than regular Hutts, as their repulsorlift shells freed them from having to use their muscles for anything except for shoveling food into their mouths. Several times during their lives they would change to larger shells because of their growing masses. These events would be celebrated.

[[File:Showdown_at_Circumtore.jpg|thumb|[[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Fett]], [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]] and [[D'harhan]] [[Battle of Circumtore|battle]] Shell Hutts at [[Circumtore/Legends|Circumtore]]]]
The Shell Hutts hired [[Pollux Poi]] to design the [[A-series assassin droid]]s against the [[Gejalli]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]], who retaliated using [[Dashade/Legends|Dashade]] [[Shadow Killer]]s.
